game_info.title: Blending Cafe Story
game_info.concept: **블렌딩 카페 스토리 (Blending Cafe Story):** Players manage a cafe by tapping and dragging furniture and decor items, such as counter seats and newspaper stands, onto a grid-based floor plan to optimize customer flow and atmosphere, with each item contributing specific "warmth" or "comfort" stats. The core loop involves creating new drink and food recipes by combining up to 3 base ingredients (e.g., coffee + milk + sugar) from a research menu, then assigning them to the main menu for sale. Customers, each with unique preferences, enter the cafe and are served automatically if a suitable item is available, generating income and increasing their satisfaction, which can lead to them becoming regulars and unlocking new customer types. Progression involves earning money to purchase new furniture, research additional ingredients, and expand the cafe's size, with the ultimate goal of achieving a "5-Star Cafe" rating by consistently satisfying customers and winning "gold prizes" in food contests by submitting optimally themed set menus. Players can also unlock and relocate their cafe to new city areas, each offering different customer demographics and challenges, by reaching specific revenue or popularity milestones.
game_info.description: Welcome to Blending Cafe Story! Manage your dream cafe by creating delicious recipes, serving customers, and expanding your business. Combine ingredients to craft unique drinks and food items, then serve them to customers with different preferences. Earn money to unlock new ingredients, upgrade your cafe, and work towards achieving a prestigious 5-Star rating. Balance customer satisfaction, recipe creativity, and strategic upgrades to build the ultimate cafe empire!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Navigate through menus and select items
Space: Confirm selection / Create recipe / Serve customer
Z: Cancel / Go back to previous menu
Shift: Toggle between Cafe View and Recipe Lab
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including navigation through menus, ingredient selection, recipe creation, and serving customers. Validates that the player can interact with all core systems.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the recipe lab, select random ingredients, create basic recipes, assign them to menu slots, and serve any waiting customers. Repeat this cycle to generate income and test the fundamental gameplay loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully creates multiple recipes, serves customers, generates income, and demonstrates that all basic interactions work correctly. The game should remain stable without errors throughout the test.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal win strategy by efficiently managing resources, creating popular recipes, and maximizing customer satisfaction to achieve the 5-Star Cafe rating.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize creating diverse recipes that match customer preferences, serve customers quickly to maximize satisfaction, reinvest earnings into new ingredients and upgrades, and strategically build reputation to reach the 5-star goal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching 5-star cafe rating within a reasonable timeframe. Validates that the win condition is achievable and the progression system works as intended.
